synthesis_notes: 9-strategy vote tally + crypto sentiment. Fear & Greed: 27 (Fear). BTC dominance 57%.

BTC-USD.key_conflict: Mean reversion flags daily Z-score 2.48 and RSI 79.5 as overbought. Resolved: BTC is in daily uptrend with hourly deeply oversold (RSI 28.9, MFI 0) — this is a pullback entry within a trend, not a distribution top. Negative funding 46 days (shorts trapped) is the decisive contrarian signal.
primary_catalysts: Goldman Sachs ETF filing pending approval
46-day negative funding = short squeeze coiled above $78K
270K BTC whale accumulation in 30 days (largest since 2013)
primary_risks: ETF April inflows cooled sharply ($69.6M vs $1.32B March)
Failed breakout pattern — volume below threshold on recent push
BTC-USD.reasoning: Broad bullish consensus (7/9 strategies) anchored by macro: historic whale accumulation, record-low exchange reserves, and 46 consecutive days of negative funding create a textbook contrarian squeeze setup. Hourly RSI at 28.9 provides the entry trigger. Mean reversion concern is a valuation note, not a timing signal — the hourly pullback IS the mean-reversion opportunity within the daily uptrend.

ETH-USD.key_conflict: Mean reversion flags Z-score 2.35 and 14.1% above 50 SMA. Resolved: ETH has the strongest trend in the basket (ADX 38.2), and the pullback from $2,421 to $2,344 IS the mean reversion. Buying here is buying after the correction, not chasing.
primary_catalysts: Strongest ETH ETF inflows of 2026 (+$187M week)
Glamsterdam upgrade H1 2026 (parallel execution, blob expansion)
ETH/BTC ratio bouncing from 2026 lows — capital rotation underway
BlackRock ETHB staked ETF: $254M in first week
primary_risks: 200 SMA at $2,875 is 23% overhead — structural resistance
Macro fear environment could slow recovery pace
ETH-USD.reasoning: Highest-quality multi-strategy consensus: 8/9 bullish, led by strongest trend (ADX 38.2), #1 ROC-21 (+21.6%), and most powerful institutional catalyst (record 2026 ETF inflows + ETH/BTC rotation). The mean reversion conflict resolves as the pullback from $2,421 creates the entry point. Best risk-adjusted setup in the basket.

SOL-USD.key_conflict: No conflict — near-unanimous neutral/avoid with bearish skew from catalyst analysis.
primary_catalysts: Firedancer full validator launch H2 2026 (1M TPS)
SOL ETF AUM crossed $1B with partial recovery flows
primary_risks: $270M Drift Protocol exploit (North Korean actor) — DeFi TVL flight risk
FTX/Alameda estate $16M SOL moved April 13 — distribution overhang
Whale accumulation collapsed 80% since March peak
SOL-USD.reasoning: Clear avoid: trendless daily structure (ADX 19.2, no EMA alignment), active hourly downtrend (ADX 76.2, 4.1x volume on flush), and real negative catalysts (Drift exploit + FTX distribution). Fundamental upgrades (Firedancer, Alpenglow) are H2 2026 — too distant for a 2-3 week swing trade. Wait for trend structure to develop before engaging.

BNB-USD.vote_tally: 2 bullish (pullback, catalyst), 3 bearish (momentum, sector_rotation, druckenmiller), 4 neutral
BNB-USD.timeframe: SKIP — no trade (monitor for hardfork play)
BNB-USD.key_conflict: Catalyst trader bullish on Osaka hardfork (Apr 28) + burn. Resolved: regulatory risk (DOJ probe, Iran-linked flows) introduces binary headline risk that caps position sizing. Daily technicals (stoch 96.2, CCI 221.8, overbought above BB) favor caution.
primary_risks: DOJ probe + Democratic senator flagging $1.7B Iran-linked Binance flows
Worst ROC-21 of basket (+4.9%) — lagging peers
Hourly RSI 20.5 — active distribution after spike
BNB-USD.reasoning: Too many conflicting signals and a regulatory wildcard to trade with conviction. The hardfork catalyst is real but 9 days out; if regulatory headline drops before then, the trade fails. Monitor for cleaner setup after hardfork resolves. Small speculative position only with tight stop ($610) for aggressive traders.

XRP-USD.key_conflict: Trend follower neutral (ADX 26.1 marginal, 50 EMA above shorter EMAs). Resolved: breakout trader identifies clean breakout with 1.89x volume above $1.477 resistance — this is a valid breakout-retest entry even without full EMA alignment. Mean reversion (Z-score 1.81) is approaching but not confirmed threshold.
primary_catalysts: CLARITY Act passage expected end of May 2026 (federal commodity framework)
XRP commodity status confirmed by SEC/CFTC March 2026 — legal overhang cleared
Rakuten Wallet integration: XRP payments at 5M+ merchants for 44M users (Japan)
XRP ETPs: $120M global inflows — most of any crypto asset this week
Kyobo Life (Korea) tokenized government bond pilot on Ripple Custody
primary_risks: 89.8M XRP moved to Coinbase on April 13 — potential $119M sell pressure near-term
BTC dominance 57% — broad altcoin rally needs BTC stabilization first
XRP-USD.reasoning: Highest-conviction setup across all 5 tickers: 7/9 strategies bullish, best cross-strategy average confidence, cleanest regulatory catalyst timeline (CLARITY Act by end of May), commodity status removes SEC risk entirely. Healthy breakout-retest structure at $1.435 with 1.89x volume confirmation. Real consumer adoption catalyst (Rakuten 44M users) distinguishes XRP from speculative altcoins. Risk-reward 3.5:1 is the best in the basket.

market_context.macro_theme: Recovering from extreme fear. Institutional ETF flows dominant. Negative funding environment = contrarian bullish for BTC. Regulatory clarity accelerating (CLARITY Act, GENIUS Act). Wait for BTC to clear $78K for broad altcoin acceleration.
